partnerModal.title: Assigned partners
partnerModal.assignLabel: Assign a partner to this company
partnerModal.noAssignments: No partners assigned to this company
partnerModal.confirmRevoke: Revoke this partner's access to the company?

modals.inviteAutoHint: ✅ Automatic invite: the client receives an email with a link to set their password and access the app.
modals.inviteManualHint: ⚠️ Manual process: credentials will be shown for you to copy and send to the client yourself.

userModal.title: Manage user - {{name}}
userModal.emailHint: This will be the user’s new login email
userModal.passwordHint: Minimum 6 characters. Leave blank to keep unchanged.
userModal.infoBullet2: • The user will be notified by email
userModal.infoBullet3: • If the password changes, a confirmation link will be sent

successModal.title: Company created!
successModal.nextStep1: • The user will receive a confirmation email
successModal.nextStep2: • They must confirm the email to activate the account
successModal.nextStep3: • After confirmation, they can log in normally

confirms.deleteCompany: Are you sure you want to delete this company?
confirms.impersonate:
Enter as a user of company "{{name}}"?

You can return to your original user anytime via the orange banner at the top.
confirms.noUser:
Company "{{name}}" has no associated user.

Click OK to create access credentials for this company.
Click Cancel to go back.

alerts.credentialsCreated:
✅ Credentials created successfully!

📧 Email: {{email}}
🔑 Password: {{password}}

⚠️ IMPORTANT — NEXT STEPS:

1️⃣ SHARE THE CREDENTIALS:
   • Email: {{email}}
   • Password: {{password}}

2️⃣ INSTRUCT THE CLIENT:
   • Go to: {{origin}}
   • Click "Sign up"
   • Company name: "{{companyName}}" (EXACT)
   • Use the email and password provided

3️⃣ AFTER REGISTRATION:
   • The system will link automatically
   • The company will have a valid user_id
   • All features will work

📋 The client must register to activate the account!
alerts.passwordChanged:
✅ Password changed successfully!

⚠️ In production, this would be done via a server-side API.

The user will receive an email to confirm the new password.
